prompt:
create a full marketing launch campaign for lumina. it's a new smart desk lamp that adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. $149 retail, target audience is remote workers 25-40

here's what i need, each one as its own file:

1. tagline.txt - memorable brand tagline (one line plz)
2. hero-copy.txt - hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. email-sequence.txt - 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. social-posts.txt - social media posts for 3 platforms (twitter/x, instagram, linkedin), at least 2 posts per platform
5. landing-page.txt - full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, faq section with at least 5 questions, cta)
6. press-release.txt - press release announcing the product launch (proper pr format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

make sense? the copy should be compelling and on-brand

okay thats it. actually do the work, don't just yap about it. write everything to the files

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content:
Headline: Meet Lumina—the smart desk lamp that syncs with your day.

Paragraph 1: Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, your calendar, and the light already in your room. It keeps you focused in the morning, energized in the afternoon, and ready to wind down when work is done.

Paragraph 2: Designed for remote workers who want their space to just work, Lumina takes the guesswork out of lighting. No more eye strain or constant fiddling—just the right light, right when you need it.

Paragraph 3: At $149, Lumina delivers premium, adaptive lighting without the premium hassle. Plug it in, connect your calendar, and let it do the rest.

Email 1
Subject: Your desk lighting just got smart

Hi there,

Meet Lumina, the smart desk lamp built for remote work. It automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, your calendar events, and ambient room light—so your workspace feels right without you touching a dial.

Whether you’re deep in focus mode or winding down after a late meeting, Lumina keeps your lighting aligned with your energy. No eye strain. No manual tweaks.

Lumina launches today for $149. Ready to light your best work?

— The Lumina Team


Email 2
Subject: The right light, right when you need it

Hi there,

Good lighting isn’t just about looks—it’s about how you feel. Lumina adapts to your day automatically:

• Morning focus: crisp, energizing light
• Afternoon balance: steady, comfortable brightness
• Evening wind-down: warmer tones that help you transition out of work mode

It also listens to your calendar and room lighting, so your setup stays effortless. Just plug in and get to work.

Lumina is available now for $149.

— The Lumina Team


Email 3
Subject: Last call: launch pricing ends soon

Hi there,

If you’ve been thinking about upgrading your home office lighting, this is your moment. Lumina’s launch is live, and early buyers get the full smart lighting experience for $149.

No more manual adjustments. No more harsh glare. Just a lamp that understands your workday and supports it automatically.

Grab Lumina before launch pricing ends.

— The Lumina Team

Twitter/X
1) Remote work, meet smarter light. Lumina adjusts brightness + color temp based on time of day, your calendar, and room lighting. Just the right light, always. $149.
2) Stop fighting your desk lamp. Lumina adapts to your schedule and space so you can focus on work, not switches. Launching now.

Instagram
1) Your desk deserves lighting that keeps up. ✨
Lumina adapts to time of day, calendar events, and ambient light for effortless focus.
$149 • Now available
2) Morning focus. Afternoon balance. Evening wind‑down.
Lumina changes with your day so your eyes don’t have to. #RemoteWork #HomeOffice

LinkedIn
1) Introducing Lumina: a smart desk lamp built for remote teams. It syncs with time of day, your calendar, and room lighting to keep work comfortable and productive. Available now for $149.
2) Better lighting = better work. Lumina automates brightness and color temperature so your home office supports deep focus without constant adjustments. Launching today.

HERO
Headline: Meet Lumina—the smart desk lamp that syncs with your day.
Subhead: Lumina automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. Just the right light, right when you need it.
CTA: Get Lumina for $149

FEATURES
1) Adaptive lighting, effortless focus
Lumina tunes your light throughout the day for focus in the morning, balance in the afternoon, and calm in the evening—no manual adjustments required.

2) Calendar-aware by design
Big presentation? Late call? Lumina reads your schedule and shifts your lighting to match the moment.

3) Responds to your room
Built-in sensors measure ambient light and compensate automatically, keeping your space comfortable even as daylight changes.

4) Designed for real workspaces
Modern, warm design with a compact footprint that fits any desk setup, from studio apartments to dedicated home offices.

TESTIMONIALS
[Customer quote placeholder]
[Customer quote placeholder]
[Customer quote placeholder]

FAQ
1) How does Lumina adjust its lighting?
Lumina uses time of day, your connected calendar events, and ambient light sensors to automatically set brightness and color temperature.

2) Do I need to manually control it?
No. Lumina is designed to be hands-free, but you can override settings anytime.

3) Does it work with any calendar?
Lumina connects to major calendar providers. More integrations are on the way.

4) Is it bright enough for detailed work?
Yes. Lumina provides ample illumination for focused tasks while maintaining eye comfort.

5) What’s included in the box?
Lumina lamp, power adapter, quick-start guide.

6) What is the price?
Lumina retails for $149.

CTA
Bring smart, adaptive light to your desk. Get Lumina for $149.

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Remote Workdays

San Francisco, CA — [Month Day, 2025] — Lumina today announced the launch of its new smart desk lamp designed for modern remote workers. Priced at $149, Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting to deliver the right light at the right moment.

“Remote work shouldn’t require constant lighting adjustments,” said [Spokesperson Name], [Title] at Lumina. “We built Lumina so it just works—supporting focus, comfort, and wellbeing throughout the day without the hassle.”

Unlike traditional desk lamps, Lumina is calendar-aware and ambient-light responsive, helping users stay productive with minimal effort. The lamp’s adaptive lighting reduces eye strain and eliminates the need to manually change settings as daylight shifts or meetings run late.

Lumina is available now for $149 at [Website URL].

About Lumina
Lumina builds smart, human-centered lighting for the modern workspace. Designed for remote workers who value productivity and wellness, Lumina products deliver an “it just works” experience that helps users focus, feel better, and do their best work.

Media Contact
[Name]
[Title]
[Email]
[Phone]
[Website]
